tasks.title: Absorb better operational gates
tasks.why: Adapt CI and release checks from packages/retort_engine/.retort/cache/github/qodo-ai/pr-agent.

tasks.title: Adopt deterministic review pipeline stages
tasks.why: External project has explicit review pipeline signals; Retort should turn absorption into staged discovery, localization, reflection, and tasking.

tasks.title: Add external file grouping before deep comparison
tasks.why: External project suggests grouping changed or related files before expensive reasoning, improving depth without broad noisy scans.

tasks.title: Add absorption quality benchmark counters
tasks.why: External project has benchmark or precision/recall signals; Retort should measure whether absorbed tasks actually improve later scores.

tasks.title: Expose Retort absorption through plugin friendly commands
tasks.why: External project exposes plugin or CLI surfaces; Retort should keep blackhole UI and automation APIs aligned.

tasks.title: Absorb better blackhole planet visual system
tasks.why: External project has planet, atmosphere, procedural surface, or WebGL scene signals; Retort should make the absorbed project planet look richer without copying assets.
